---
name: Good First Issue
about: A task that is well-scoped and suitable for new contributors
title: "[Good First Issue] "
labels: good first issue, help wanted
assignees: ''
---

**What needs to be done**
A clear description of the task.

**Where to look**
Which files or directories are relevant.

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Tests pass

**Helpful context**
Any background knowledge or links that would help someone new to the project.

**Estimated effort**
- [ ] Small (< 1 hour)
- [ ] Medium (1-4 hours)
- [ ] Large (4+ hours)
